creator: ve@sci.fi
text:
Fetchmail has been upgraded to version 5.4.4 by the author.

Fix: Commit the patches below.

This update is also supposed to fix the problem described in
PR:ports/19996 according to the fetchmail author.

Poul-Henning Kamp <phk@freebsd.org> had a problem trying to use the
previous fetchmail port version on FreeBSD-current with OpenSSL
(USA_RESIDENT=NO), where compilation was unable to find
openssl/idea.h. I'm unable to check whether the problem has been fixed
in the new version as I don't have a current machine or OpenSSL.

How-To-Repeat: 
% cd /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail
% make

Note that it builds an old version :-)
